title: The Baby's Room
excerpt: On the agenda this weekend is getting a changing table and finishing up sorting the baby's stuff. This little guy has been spoiled already with gifts galore from around the world! We feel so blessed and loved. Now I just…
body: On the agenda this weekend is getting a changing table and finishing up sorting the baby's stuff. This little guy has been spoiled already with gifts galore from around the world! We feel so blessed and loved. Now I just need to muster up the energy to get it all sorted out. Went to the doctor this morning and looks like the little guy will stay put for at least another week (my next appointment). I am feeling less and less comfortable, but looking forward to relaxing and doing chores this weekend. Or trying to get others to do them for me while I supervise- wink wink. Hope you all have a great one!
